titleStmt.title: SII 22.435: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 435. (A.R. No. 435 of 1906) TIRUNELVELI DISTRICT, SRIVAIKUNTHAM TALUK, MURAPPANĀḌU. VĒDANĀRĀYAṆA-PERUMĀḶ TEMPLE—ON THE SAME WALL JAṬĀVARMAN VĪRA-PĀṆḌYADĒVA—14th YEAR

summary.p: The king claims to have taken Īḻam, Koṅgu, and Śoḻa-nāḍu and performed the anointment of heroes at Perumbaṟṟappuliyūr. The details of the date are given as Kaṟkaṭaka, śu. 1, Sunday, Pushya which would be equivalent to 1266 A.D., July 4. This registers a deed given by the Mahāsabhā of Pōsaḷavīra Sōmidēvachaturvēdimaṅgalam, a brahmadēya in Murappunāḍu, to god Śrī Narasimha-Paramasvāmi enshrined in the maṭha of Ēkadaṇḍa-Paramahaṁsa in the village, confirming the title of the deity to the ownership of some lands in the village, with their contours and extent specified. This included two plots one of which had been sold in the 11th year of the king for the formation of a flower garden and the other granted in the same year as maḍappuṟam by a certain Śrīkṛishṇa Bhaṭṭaṉ of Iraivānaraiyūr (Elavānāśūr in the South Arcot District), and also a third which was granted tax-free by order of the king in his 13th year of reign.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . koccaṭaiyapaṉmarāṉa tribhuvaṉac cakkaravattikaḷ Īḻamuṅ koṅkuñ coṇāṭuṅ koṇṭu perumpaṟṟappuliyūril virābhiṣekam paṇṇiaruḷiya śrī virapāṇṭiyatevaṟku yāṇṭu 10 4vatu kaṟkaṭaka nāyaṟṟu pūrvapakṣattu prathamai yum nāyaṟṟukkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa pūcattunāḷ murappunāṭṭu brahmadeyam śrī pocalavira somideva caturvedimaṅkalattu mahāsabhaiyom Ivvūril Ekadaṇḍaparamahamsar maṭattil samārādhatanaṅkoṇṭaruḷkiṟa śrī narasiṅhaparamasvāmi kaḷukku piṭipāṭu paṇṇikkuṭutta paricāvatu Innāyaṉāṟku nāṅkaḷ
muṉpu Iddevaṟku 10 1- vatil vṛścika nāyaṟṟil nāṅkaḷ viṟṟukkuṭutta nilam śrīdevivatikkuk kiḻakku Aṉavarataṉ vāykkālukkut teṟku Iraṇṭāṅkaṇ ṇāṟṟu Eṭṭāñ ceyyum Oṉpatāñ ceyk kuṟaiyilum muṉṟāṅkaṇṇāṟṟu Eṭṭāñ ceyyilum Oṉpatāñ ceykkuṟaiyilum vaṭakkaṭaiyap pātiyil muṉpu nilamāyk karaiyiṭṭa nilamum civaikuntattil kaḷḷappirāṉ tirunandavaṉappuṟamāy muṉpu piṭipāṭupaṇṇikkuṭutta nilamum meṟkaṭaiya saukariyamāṉapaṭiyile nikki nikki Uḷḷa nilattile Āṟṟaṅkaraiyaruke
kiḻmelaraikkol koṇṭu teṉvaṭalāka nikkiṉa vaḻiyait taviṟntu Aṉavarataṉ vāykkālukkut teṟku Iraṇṭāṅ kaṇṇāṟṟu Eṭṭāñ ceyyil mel talaiyilumāka kiḻakkuviṭṭa Araikkolukku meltalaiyile viṭṭuviṭṭa nilattukku nilam kiḻakke Aṉubhavippārākavu mintavaḻi tirunāṭuṭaiyāṉ vāykkālaḷavum teṟku nokkip poyp piṉṉai tirunāṭaiyāṉ vāykkāloṭe Araikkāl kol kūṭṭik koṇṭu kiḻakku nokkippoy muṉputtai vaḻiyiloṭṭip po
vutākavu(tākavu)m pomiṭattu Iṅku viṭṭa vaḻiyāluḷḷa nilam kiḻakke taṭatoṟun talaimāṭṭile cera niṟpārākavum muṉpu Iddevaṟku patiṉoṉṟāvatu kaṟkaṭakanāyaṟṟil Imaṭattukku maṭappuṟamāka Iṟaiyiliṭṭu piṭipāṭu paṇṇikkuṭutta nilam Araimāvil muḻucciṟaic colaippirāṉ bhaṭṭaṉ centaṟattu Agnidevabhaṭṭa somayājiyār paṅkāy Ājñākrayaṅ koṇṭa paṅkil Iccolaippirāṉ bhaṭṭaṉ maṭappuṟamāka dāṉam paṇṇiṉa nilaṅ kāṇikku muṉṟu māp paṅku kuṭuppanāka Ājñākraya mākaiyāle Ippaṅku Agnideva
bhaṭṭa somayājiyār Artthaṅ kuṭuttukkoḷkaiyāle Iṟaivāṉaraiyūr śrīkṛṣṇabhaṭṭaṉ maṭattukku maṭappuṟamāka dāṉam paṇṇiṉa nilam śrīdevivatikku meṟkuc cevakatteva vāykkālukku vaṭakku 100 6 10 4 cey 5 pakha vaṭakkaṭaiya nilam �kha meṟkaṭaiya 5 ma Innilaṅ kāṇiyum muṉpu Ippaṅki liṟaivāṉaraiyūr saṅkirtana bhaṭṭaṉ maṭappuṟamāka dāṉam paṇṇiṉa talaittaram nilam mam Āka nilam � Innila maraimāvukkup paṅku khapa Ippaṅkāṟu māvum Ippaṅkile Iṟaiyiliyākak kūṭṭikkoṇṭu Aṉubhavip pārākavum patiṉmuṉṟāvatu pacāṉam mutal pākaḷūr keśavaṉ paṅkoṉ
ṟum maṭappuṟamākak kārāṇmai yiṟaiyiliyāka prasādañ ceytaruḷiṉa tirumukam varukaiyāle tirumukap paṅkoṉṟum maṭappuṟamākak kārāṇmai yiṟaiyili yāka Aṉubhavippārākavum Ippaṭikkuk kalliluñ cempilum veṭṭikkoḷvārākavum Ippaṭi sammatittup piṭipāṭu paṇṇikkuṭuttom Ivvūril Ekadaṇḍaparamahamsar maṭattil Eḻuntaruḷi ssamārādhanaṅ koṇṭaruḷukiṟa śrī narasiṅhaparamasvāmikaḷukku sabhaiyom Ivai Iruṅkaṇṭit tiruvaraṅkanārāyaṇa ṉeḻuttu Irāyūṟ coṭṭai ravidevabhaṭṭa somayājiyār makaṉ maheśvarabhaṭṭaṉeḻuttu Ivai mu
Ivai vaṟṟalūr yajñamurttibhaṭṭa ṉeḻuttu Ivai kāñcai mabhaṭṭasya mahāsurai A nāthabhasya Iṭaiyūrkkuṭit tirumāl Iruñcolai nārāyaṇabhaṭṭasya Ivai prāntūr viṟ
ṟiruntāṉeḻuttu Ivai kāñcai kāṭṭukkuṟi daṇḍakumārabhaṭṭasya prayāgai bhavasvāmibhaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai vaṟṟalūr śrī mādhavabhaṭṭa somayājinaḥ Ivai Iṭaiyāṟṟuk
kuṭi Eṟutaruvuṭaiyāṉ bhaṭṭa ṉeḻuttu Ivai pāṟkoṉṟait tiruvicalū raṭikaḷ bhaṭṭaṉeḻuttu Ivai Iṟaivāṉaraiyūr nārāyaṇaṉ saṅkirttaṉa bhaṭṭa ṉeḻuttu Ivai muṭumpai kanola vāmaṉabhaṭṭasya Irāyūr nā
rāyṇa bhaṭṭasya Ivai prāntūr nārāyaṇa bhaṭṭaṉeḻuttu Ivai govindabhaṭṭa somayājinaḥ Ivai vaṅkippuṟattu śrī kṛṣṇabhaṭṭaṉeḻuttu Ivai kurovi śrī bharatāḻvāṉ bhaṭṭasya Ivai ceñalūr nagnabhaṭṭa somayāji Agni
cit sarvakratukkaḷ makaṉ devabhaṭṭa somayāji Agnicit vājapeyayājina Ippaṭikku Ivai Iruṅkaṇṭi Āvuṭaiyāṉ bhaṭṭaṉeḻuttu Ivai śrī raṅganāthabhaṭṭa ṉeḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai gomaṭhattu dāmodarabha
ṭṭa somayāji Eḻuttu Irāyūṟ coṭṭai yajñātmabhaṭṭa somayāji Eḻuttu Ivai vaṟṟalūr śrī mādhavabhaṭṭa somayājiyār makaṉ śrīdharabhaṭṭaṉeḻuttu Ivai kāñcai suyajña śrīdhara bhaṭṭaṉ makaṉ pārtthasārathi bhaṭṭa
Digital edition of SII 22.435 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
